name: Professor James Moriarty
biography: Professor James Moriarty is Holmes's greatest adversary — a brilliant mathematician turned criminal mastermind. Once a respected academic who wrote a treatise on the Binomial Theorem and held a chair at a small university, Moriarty descended into crime, becoming the organizing intelligence behind a vast criminal network spanning London and beyond. Holmes describes him as 'the Napoleon of Crime' — the spider at the center of a web, touching every major crime without ever dirtying his own hands. Moriarty and Holmes meet their apparent end together at the Reichenbach Falls in 1891, though Colonel Sebastian Moran survives to carry on part of his network.
